summary: Russian forces struck Kharkiv with a KAB bomb, killing a 23-year-old woman and wounding 10, while also hitting a private enterprise in Dnipro that killed 4 and wounded 10. Ukrainian forces struck three key bridges in occupied Donetsk and Luchansk regions used for personnel and logistics transfers. Widespread Russian drone attacks targeted multiple Ukrainian regions including Kharkiv, Sumy, Poltava, Dnipropetrovsk, Zaporizhzhia, Odesa, and Cherkasy oblasts.
key_points: Russian KAB bomb struck Kharkiv, killing a 23-year-old woman and wounding 10 people, damaging a tram, power network, over 15 cars, and nearby buildings. (Source: @UkraineNow/82267)
Russian forces attacked a private enterprise in Dnipro, killing 4 and wounding 10, with rescue operations ongoing. (Source: @UkraineNow/82259)

Ukrainian forces struck three key bridges in occupied Donetsk and Luhansk regions, including a road bridge near Novoazovsk and two railway bridges, disrupting enemy logistics. (Source: @UkraineNow/82268)
Russian drones attacked a gas station near Poltava. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31238)
Russian artillery destroyed a Ukrainian military shelter in Konstantinovka. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31242)
Russian MoD claims liberation of Bogodarovka in Dnipropetrovsk region. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31243)

Multiple Russian drone incursions detected across Kharkiv, Sumy, Poltava, Dnipropetrovsk, Zaporizhzhia, Odesa, and Cherkasy oblasts, including reactive-type UAVs. (Source: @kpszsu/66757, @kpszsu/66745, @kpszsu/66772, @kpszsu/66785, @kpszsu/66792, @eRadarrua/98596, @eRadarrua/98608, @eRadarrua/98628, @eRadarrua/98642)
Russian MoD reported strikes on a gas distribution station in Kharkovsky region, damaging gas storage tanks and gas pumping units. (Source: @tass_agency/382936)

sections.executive_summary: Russian forces conducted KAB bomb strikes on Kharkiv and Dnipro, killing at least 5 civilians and wounding over 20, while Ukrainian forces struck three key logistics bridges in occupied Donetsk and Luhansk regions. Widespread Russian drone attacks targeted at least eight Ukrainian oblasts, including reactive-type UAVs approaching from the Black Sea toward Mykolaiv region. The Russian MoD claimed the liberation of Bogodarovka in Dnipropetrovsk region and reported strikes on a gas distribution station in Kharkiv region.

points: Ukrainian forces struck three important bridges in occupied Donetsk and Luhansk regions, including a road bridge near Novoazovsk in Donetsk region and two railway bridges in Luhansk region, which the enemy uses for transferring personnel, weapons, ammunition, and materiel. (Source: @UkraineNow/82268)
A Russian FPV drone attacked a route taxi in Zaporizhzhia, killing two people and wounding six, including a child. (Source: @UkraineNow/82257)

Russian KAB bomb struck Kharkiv, killing a 23-year-old woman and wounding 10 people; damage included a tram, electrical network, over 15 cars, an enterprise building, and nearby houses. (Source: @UkraineNow/82267)
Russian forces attacked a private enterprise in Dnipro, killing 4 and wounding 10, with a 22-year-old man in serious condition. (Source: @UkraineNow/82259)
Russian drones attacked a gas station near Poltava. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31238)
The commander of the 154th Separate Mechanized Brigade, Vladimir Kononnikov, was found dead; the reasons are being established by the South operational command. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31226)
Local residents are resisting military commissars, with videos filmed in Krivoy Rog and Zaporozhye. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31232)
Russian MoD reported strikes on a gas distribution station in Kharkiv region, damaging gas storage tanks and gas pumping units. (Source: @tass_agency/382936)
Russian MoD claims liberation of Bogodarovka in Dnipropetrovsk region. (Source: @tass_agency/382939, @ukr_leaks_eng/31243)
Russian aviation struck a Ukrainian troop deployment point in Nikolayevka DNR with two FAB-1500 bombs. (Source: @tass_agency/382934)
Russian artillery destroyed a Ukrainian military shelter in Konstantinovka. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31242)
A fire occurred at an oil refinery in Krasnodar Krai due to falling drone debris; the fire area was reportedly halved. (Source: @tass_agency/382937, @tass_agency/382943)
One Tu-160 strategic bomber was redeployed from the Far East to Engels airbase for arming with cruise missiles. (Source: @eRadarrua/98588)
Severe fuel shortages reported in Irkutsk, with the governor officially recognizing fuel has run out, reaching 80% shortage, with most gas stations closed. (Source: @eRadarrua/98606)

key_developments: Russian KAB bomb struck Kharkiv, killing a 23-year-old woman and wounding 10 people, damaging a tram, electrical network, over 15 cars, an enterprise building, and nearby houses. (Source: @UkraineNow/82267)
Russian forces attacked a private enterprise in Dnipro, killing 4 and wounding 10, with rescue operations ongoing. (Source: @UkraineNow/82259)

Ukrainian forces struck three key bridges in occupied Donetsk and Luhansk regions, including a road bridge near Novoazovsk and two railway bridges, disrupting enemy logistics. (Source: @UkraineNow/82268)
Russian MoD claims liberation of Bogodarovka in Dnipropetrovsk region and reported strikes on a gas distribution station in Kharkiv region. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31243, @tass_agency/382936)

Widespread Russian drone attacks detected across Kharkiv, Sumy, Poltava, Dnipropetrovsk, Zaporizhzhia, Odesa, and Cherkasy oblasts, including reactive-type UAVs from the Black Sea toward Mykolaiv region. (Source: @kpszsu/66757, @kpszsu/66776, @eRadarrua/98608)
One Tu-160 strategic bomber was redeployed from the Far East to Engels airbase for arming with cruise missiles, signaling potential long-range strike preparations. (Source: @eRadarrua/98588)

Russian FPV drone attacked a route taxi in Zaporizhzhia, killing two and wounding six including a child; Russian artillery destroyed a Ukrainian military shelter in Konstantinovka. (Source: @UkraineNow/82257, @ukr_leaks_eng/31242)
sections.threat_assessment: The operational tempo is escalating significantly with Russian forces employing KAB guided bombs against Kharkiv and Dnipro, causing substantial civilian casualties and infrastructure damage. The redeployment of a Tu-160 strategic bomber to Engels airbase for cruise missile arming suggests potential preparation for deeper strikes into Ukrainian territory. Widespread drone attacks across at least eight oblasts indicate Russia's continued capacity for multi-axis aerial pressure. Ukrainian strikes on three key logistics bridges in occupied Donetsk and Luhansk represent a meaningful disruption to Russian supply lines. The Russian MoD's claim of liberating Bogodarovka in Dnipropetrovsk region, if confirmed, would represent a notable territorial gain in an area not recently associated with frontline shifts.
sections.regional_response: Belarus Foreign Ministry stated it will respond with all its potential if Ukraine crosses its borders, signaling continued Minsk concern about border incidents. Estonian Foreign Minister Margus Tsahkna stated that Ukrainian drone incidents in NATO countries are an acceptable price for strikes against Russia, explicitly calling on Ukraine not to abandon attacks on Russian targets. Putin claimed to have received new proposals for ending the war, including limiting combat to four territories and halting deep strikes from both sides, while asserting Russian strikes are more powerful and destructive.
sections.intelligence_notes: Severe fuel shortages in Irkutsk, with the governor officially recognizing 80% shortage and most gas stations closed, may indicate broader sanctions impact on Russian domestic logistics. The Russian MoD's claim of liberating Bogodarovka in Dnipropetrovsk region requires independent verification as it represents an unusual claim for that area. The concentration of reactive-type drones approaching from the Black Sea toward Mykolaiv region suggests Russia maintains maritime launch capabilities for UAV operations. Putin's public discussion of ceasefire proposals limiting combat to four territories may indicate Kremlin signaling for negotiation positioning, though he simultaneously claimed Russia is advancing on all fronts.
